scripts.start:watch:all: concurrently -n api-gateway,mock-payment,order-service,payment-service,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "npm run start:dev -w apps/api-gateway" "npm run start:dev -w apps/mock-payment-gateway" "npm run start:dev -w apps/order-service" "npm run start:dev -w apps/payment-service" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
